name: Reader
description: A local-first ebook reader. Open EPUB and text files, organize a library into folders, read with fully configurable typography and themes, or speed-read with an RSVP word-by-word mode.
author: Moldable

capabilities.name: Reader library
capabilities.description: Read and import books in the Reader library for the active workspace.

scopes.name: List books
scopes.description: List books in the library with summary metadata.

scopes.name: Import a book
scopes.description: Import a local .epub or .txt file into the library.

filePath.description: Absolute local path to an existing .epub or .txt file.

folderName.description: Optional existing folder name to place the imported book in.

createFolder.description: Create folderName if it does not already exist. Defaults to false.

scopes.name: List folders
scopes.description: List library folders and their book IDs.

scopes.name: Search the book store
scopes.description: Search direct-download public ebook catalogs for books to install.

query.description: Title or author to search for.

scopes.name: Install a book from the store
scopes.description: Download, verify, and install a direct-download EPUB into the library.

id.description: Store install key returned by store.search, such as gutenberg:84 or open-library:identifier. Numeric Gutenberg ids are still accepted.

tagline: Read EPUBs your way, or speed-read them
